records.title: Acme Corp — 8-K Current Report, 12 Jun 2026
records.summary: Acme Corp filed an 8-K disclosing a new $250M Series-Extended round and the formation of an AI Platform business unit; net headcount growth in engineering signaled for 2026 H2.

records.title: Globex — 10-Q Quarterly Report, 1 May 2026
records.summary: Globex disclosed in its 10-Q a 12% year-over-year decline in professional services revenue and announced a workforce restructuring to prioritize cloud platform investment.
